title: podman umount: error out if called with no args
body:
Inspired by #2684, I wrote a CI test to look for other such
instances in which a command is invoked without a required
argument. 'podman umount' seems to be the only one.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: New force push: fixes problem caught by @rhatdan (making the code much cleaner in the process, thank you!) and also fixes three other problems caught in testing. Commit message edited to reflect new changes.
